sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89514" key="proskataktei/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκατα-κτείνω</orth>, <sense id="n89514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kill besides</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προσαπο-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2450.tlg001:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Palaeph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
